{{Quote|I am the ''Sheyf'' Tinte, boy—leader of the Guardians and you will speak to me with respect!|Tinté Vos|<ref name="SW 32">[[Star Wars (1998) 32|''Star Wars'' (1998) 32]]</ref>}}
'''Tinté Vos''' was a [[Kiffar/Legends|Kiffar]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] who was the great-aunt of Kiffar [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Quinlan Vos/Legends|Quinlan Vos]] and ruler of the twin worlds [[Kiffu/Legends|Kiffu]] and [[Kiffex/Legends|Kiffex]] during the waning years of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].

==Biography==
Tinté began her career as a [[Kiffu Guardians|Kiffu Guardian]], rising in rank to be their leader, while Kiffu and Kiffex were under the more benevolent rule of her brother [[Sheyf]] [[Kurlin Vos]]. Motivated by greed for power, she sacrificed [[Pethros Vos|Pethros]] and [[Quian Vos]], father and mother of [[Quinlan Vos/Legends|Quinlan Vos]], to the [[Anzat (species)|Anzati]] who were on Kiffex to worship "The Dreaming One," Anzati [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] [[Volfe Karkko]].

She then gave the guardian badges of his parents to young Quinlan, hoping to turn him to the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side]] and mold him into an heir for herself. This enraged Kurlin, who gave the [[Jedi Watchman/Legends|Jedi Watchman]] [[Tholme/Legends|Tholme]] permission to take Quinlan to the [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]] for training. In response, Tinté poisoned her brother and assumed his mantle as Sheyf.

===Death===
{{Quote|You are a deceiving, manipulative murderer—and you deserve to die!|Quinlan Vos|<ref name="J:CD" />}}
[[File:Quinlankillstinte.jpg|thumb|left|180px|[[Quinlan Vos/Legends|Quinlan Vos]] avenges his parents' death.]]
Unwilling to bow to [[Count/Legends|Count]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku's]] wishes to turn Kiffu and Kiffex into a staging ground for [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] forces during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], Tinté was [[Raid on Kiffu|killed]] by Quinlan Vos at Dooku's behest, after being forced to reveal her murder of Quinlan's parents.<ref name="J:CD" />

In the aftermath of her death, Kiffu and Kiffex were repressed by the Confederacy.

==Personality and traits==
Sheyf Tinté Vos had extreme nationalist tendencies and beliefs, considering the Republic a cultural melting pot that would only use and exploit Kiffu and Kiffex for its own gain. She did not regret sacrificing her relatives, and her lack of remorse cost Vos her life.

{{Char-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
Her name is spelled "Tinté" in ''Jedi: Count Dooku''. However, in both the [[Star Wars: Twilight (trade paperback)|''Twilight'']] and [[Star Wars: Darkness (trade paperback)|''Darkness'']] arcs of the [[Star Wars: Republic|''Star Wars'' comic]], it is spelled "Tinte."
